Excel Intelligence Platform

Your Excel.
Supercharged
by Real Data.

mbiX syncs Google Sheets data into a local SQLite database through a full ETL pipeline — giving your Excel workbooks live, validated, schema-driven data.

Download Interactive Demo
5+
System Tables
3
Sync Lanes
0
Ghost Processes
100%
COM Safe
Features

Built for Data Engineers

Everything you need to bridge Google Sheets and Excel — without the cloud middleware.

ETL Pipeline

Full extract, transform, load cycle with built-in validation and schema enforcement.

SQLite Engine

Local, fast, zero-config database that lives inside your Excel Add-in. No server needed.

Schema Governance

Define rules once. mbiX validates every column, type, and relation before it hits your sheet.

Live Sync

Pull real-time data from Google Sheets with configurable refresh intervals.

COM Safe

Native VSTO architecture ensures 100% compatibility with Excel without ghost processes.

Zero Dependencies

No cloud servers, no subscriptions, no third-party lock-in. Your data stays yours.

Architecture

How It Works

A 3-lane sync pipeline that moves data from cloud to workbook in seconds.

1

Configure Tables

Define your system tables in Google Sheets. mbiX reads the schema and knows what to sync.

2

Run Sync

One click triggers the full ETL pipeline. Data is validated, cleaned, and loaded into SQLite.

3

Work in Excel

Your data appears instantly in the Ribbon — ready to query, pivot, and analyze.

Live Demo

See mbiX in Action

Watch how a single click transforms raw Google Sheets into structured Excel intelligence.

Data Model

Schema Reference

5 system tables power the entire platform. Clean, relational, and version-controlled.

Table Columns Purpose
SYS_SyncConfig8Defines sync sources, targets, and refresh intervals
SYS_SchemaRules6Column-level validation rules and data types
SYS_PipelineLog5Audit trail for every ETL run
SYS_LookupTables4Reference data for dropdowns and relations
SYS_UserSettings3Per-user preferences and licensing
